objective: Download and benchmark the governed Mac MLX candidate mlx-community/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-4bit without changing routing authority or PII policy.
scope_boundary: Use no-PII synthetic prompts and built-in MLX synthetic benchmark inputs.
Record runtime blocker and successful benchmark evidence.
Keep the model as a candidate only and avoid routing promotion.
Record validation, PDCA/R, execution scope, closeout, and roadmap mirrors.
out_of_scope: PII prompts or cloud fallback for PII.
research_summary: Issue #347 added mlx-community/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-4bit as a Mac MLX on-demand candidate with a 24 GB budget. Issue #351 validates the runtime claim by downloading the model and benchmarking it on this Mac17,8 Apple M5 Pro with 48 GB unified memory. System Python 3.9 with mlx-lm 0.29.1 cannot load the model because qwen3_5_moe is unsupported; Python 3.11 with mlx-lm 0.31.2 and mlx 0.31.1 loads and benchmarks the model successfully.

sprints.name: Download and Runtime Probe
sprints.goal: Download the model and determine the working local MLX runtime.
tasks: Verify disk headroom and local runtime prerequisites.
Run a tiny smoke generation and capture failures.
acceptance_criteria: Download completes or exact blocker is captured.
No-PII smoke generation either succeeds or records a precise runtime blocker.

sprints.name: Benchmark and Closeout
sprints.goal: Record benchmark performance, memory evidence, and closeout artifacts.
tasks: Record PDCA/R, closeout, and roadmap mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark evidence includes model ID, command, timing, token count or estimate, and memory observations.
No routing order, PII policy, or active model promotion is changed.
E2E local validation passes after artifacts are written.

specialist_reviews.focus: Download completion, no-PII prompts, MLX runtime compatibility, memory/tokens-per-second evidence, and no routing promotion.
specialist_reviews.summary: The model downloaded and benchmarks successfully on Python 3.11 with mlx-lm 0.31.2. System Python 3.9 runtime blocker is recorded.

alternate_model_review.summary: This benchmark-only slice does not modify STANDARDS.md, routing order, PII policy, or active model authority.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Download and benchmark Qwen3.6 MLX candidate, then record evidence and closeout only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run local gates, Stage 6 closeout, open PR, and merge after CI passes.

material_deviation_rules: If model loading requires routing-policy changes, stop and open a separate standards issue.
If benchmark prompts require real user data, stop and use synthetic prompts only.
If memory pressure is unsafe, stop and record the blocker instead of forcing a run.
If promotion into active routing is desired, open a separate promotion issue after benchmark closeout.
